datasets.name: ds-kpi-classic
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, total_cost_usd, estimated_savings_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_compute_sizing_mv')

datasets.name: ds-kpi-serverless
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true

datasets.name: ds-compute-compare
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, CASE WHEN is_serverless = true THEN 'Serverless' ELSE 'Classic' END AS compute_type, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS job_count FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), CASE WHEN is_serverless = true THEN 'Serverless' ELSE 'Classic' END ORDER BY total_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds-classic-sizing
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, sizing_recommendation, COUNT(*) AS job_count, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_compute_sizing_mv') GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), sizing_recommendation ORDER BY job_count DESC

datasets.name: ds-cpu-dist
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, CASE WHEN avg_cpu_util IS NULL THEN 'No Data' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 20 THEN '<20%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 40 THEN '20-40%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 60 THEN '40-60%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 80 THEN '60-80%' ELSE '>80%' END AS cpu_range, COUNT(*) AS job_count FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_compute_sizing_mv') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY job_count DESC

datasets.name: ds-instance-type
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, worker_node_type, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost, COUNT(*) AS job_count FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_compute_sizing_mv') WHERE worker_node_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), worker_node_type ORDER BY total_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds-job-detail
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_name, sizing_recommendation, owned_by, worker_node_type, COALESCE(CAST(configured_workers AS STRING), CONCAT(CAST(min_autoscale_workers AS STRING), '-', CAST(max_autoscale_workers AS STRING))) AS workers_config, run_count, ROUND(avg_cpu_util, 1) AS avg_cpu_pct, ROUND(avg_mem_util, 1) AS avg_mem_pct, ROUND(total_cost_usd, 2) AS total_cost_usd, ROUND(estimated_savings_usd, 2) AS estimated_savings_usd, recommendation_detail FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_compute_sizing_mv') ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: ds-srv-top
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_label, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds-srv-detail
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_label, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count, ROUND(AVG(run_duration_minutes), 1) AS avg_duration_min, ROUND(SUM(total_dbus), 2) AS total_dbus, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds-ap-kpi
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, cluster_id, job_id, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE cluster_source = 'UI'

datasets.name: ds-ap-cluster
queryLines: SELECT cluster_id, cluster_name, owned_by, worker_node_type, COALESCE(CAST(configured_workers AS STRING), CONCAT(COALESCE(CAST(min_autoscale_workers AS STRING),'?'), '-', COALESCE(CAST(max_autoscale_workers AS STRING),'?'))) AS workers_config, COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS job_count, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count, ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_util), 1) AS avg_cpu_util, ROUND(AVG(avg_mem_util), 1) AS avg_mem_util, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost_usd, DATE(MIN(run_start_time)) AS run_start_time, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) >= 3 AND (AVG(avg_cpu_util) IS NULL OR AVG(avg_cpu_util) < 30) AND (AVG(avg_mem_util) IS NULL OR AVG(avg_mem_util) < 40) THEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) >= 2 THEN 'CONSIDER_JOB_COMPUTE' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) = 1 AND (AVG(avg_cpu_util) IS NULL OR AVG(avg_cpu_util) < 30) THEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE' ELSE 'APPROPRIATE' END AS sizing_signal, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) >= 2 THEN CONCAT(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS STRING), '개 Job 공유 → Job Compute 격리 시 개별 sizing 최적화 가능. Downsize 권고.') WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) = 1 AND (AVG(avg_cpu_util) IS NULL OR AVG(avg_cpu_util) < 30) THEN '단일 Job이 All-Purpose 클러스터 점유. Job Compute 전환 권고.' ELSE '현재 구성 적절.' END AS job_isolation_recommendation FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE cluster_source = 'UI' GROUP BY cluster_id, cluster_name, owned_by, worker_node_type, configured_workers, min_autoscale_workers, max_autoscale_workers ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: ds-ap-signal-dist
queryLines: WITH ap AS ( SELECT cluster_id, COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS job_count, AVG(avg_cpu_util) AS avg_cpu, AVG(avg_mem_util) AS avg_mem, MIN(run_start_time) AS min_run_start FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE cluster_source = 'UI' GROUP BY cluster_id ) SELECT CASE WHEN job_count >= 3 AND (avg_cpu IS NULL OR avg_cpu < 30) AND (avg_mem IS NULL OR avg_mem < 40) THEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE' WHEN job_count >= 2 THEN 'CONSIDER_JOB_COMPUTE' WHEN job_count = 1 AND (avg_cpu IS NULL OR avg_cpu < 30) THEN 'LIKELY_DOWNSIZE' ELSE 'APPROPRIATE' END AS sizing_signal, COUNT(*) AS cluster_count, DATE(MIN(min_run_start)) AS run_start_time FROM ap GROUP BY 1

datasets.name: ds-ap-jobs
queryLines: SELECT cluster_name, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_name, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count, ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_util), 1) AS avg_cpu_util, ROUND(AVG(avg_mem_util), 1) AS avg_mem_util, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost_usd, DATE(MIN(run_start_time)) AS run_start_time FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_profiles_mv') WHERE cluster_source = 'UI' GROUP BY cluster_name, job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC LIMIT 50

lines: Sizing signals: DEFINITE_DOWNSIZE · LIKELY_DOWNSIZE · BURST_PATTERN · IO_BOTTLENECK · CONSIDER_UPSIZE · APPROPRIATE

frame.title: Jobs Running on Shared All-Purpose Clusters
